name: Paddle
description: Paddle is a complete SaaS billing platform that acts as a merchant of record, handling payments, tax compliance, and subscription management globally. It lets you create products, define pricing, manage subscriptions, and track transactions without worrying about sales tax or VAT collection.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new product in your Paddle catalog that can have one or more prices attached to it.

capabilities.name: create_price
capabilities.description: Create a price for a product, defining the amount, currency, and billing cycle for one-time or recurring charges.

capabilities.name: create_subscription
capabilities.description: Create a subscription by passing items (prices) and a customer, initiating recurring billing.

capabilities.name: list_transactions
capabilities.description: List and filter transactions across your Paddle account, including completed payments and pending charges.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record in Paddle with an email and optional name.

capabilities.name: get_subscription
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full details and current status of an existing subscription.
